checks.detail: Delegation structure intact: 00_HANDOVER.md and phase prompt files 01-05 define orchestrator-only operation; agent charters in .claude/agents/ carry the implementation scope. Nothing in the repo shows orchestrator-authored analysis or site code. Caveat: orchestrator in-session behavior is not fully verifiable from file state, but no evidence contradicts it.

One-way flow verified in charters and data. data-agent.md tools = Strava health/list_activities + Read/Write, writes scoped to data/raw/ only; analyst-agent.md = Read/Write only (no Strava tools), scoped to data/summary/, never writes HTML; builder-agent.md has no Strava tools and is scoped to site/. Re-fetched data/raw/2026-W28.json contains only raw Strava-mapped fields (no computed values); regenerated data/summary/2026-W28.json is pure JSON. Sanity reconciliation of current W28 raw->summary by hand: on-foot = 2 Walks (4+3 m) + 2 TrailRuns (26+414 m) excluding WeightTraining -> vert 447 m, time 4822+2252+6216=13290 s, distance 7338+5810+13211=26359 m, sessions 5 total / 4 on-foot; daily 07-06 = 33 m / 7074 s / 13148 m and 07-08 = 414 m / 6216 s / 13211 m. All match the summary exactly. Derived numbers correct: prorated 1100*4/7=629, pct_of_target 41, pct_of_prorated 71. site/data copies verified identical to data/ (plan.json, summary/index.json, all five weekly summaries incl. the refreshed W28 with generated_at 2026-07-09T12:05:00Z). Calf-rehab surfacing intact: raw calf mentions in W24 and W26 appear as type:'calf' flags in both data/summary and site/data/summary, and site/app.js renderFlags() renders a distinct 'CALF' badge and keeps earlier weeks' flags visible under 'EARLIER' (W28 currently has no calf mention, flags [] is correct).

Grepped all #hex literals across site/ (styles.css, app.js; index.html has none): every literal is one of the 15 TMS9918 colors in CLAUDE.md (#000000 #3EB849 #74D07D #5955E0 #8076F1 #B95E51 #65DBEF #DB6559 #FF897D #CCC35E #DED087 #3AA241 #B766B5 #CCCCCC #FFFFFF). No off-palette hex; the only non-hex color use is alpha-only rgba(0,0,0,x) scanline shading over black.

Grepped site/ for href="/, src="/, url(/, fetch("/ and single-quote variants: zero matches. index.html references styles.css and app.js relatively; app.js fetches ./data/plan.json, ./data/summary/index.json and ./data/summary/<week>.json — all relative, safe at the knoxy.com/gtcb/ subpath.

All five raw and five summary windows verified Mon 00:00:00 -> following Sun 23:59:59, tz Europe/London, iso_week consistent with window.start's ISO week and filename (W24=06-08 ... W28=07-06, each a Monday). Current-week W28 (today Thu 2026-07-09) has days_elapsed=4, daily array covers exactly 2026-07-06..12 in order, and all in-window activity start_date_local values fall inside the window.

data/plan.json unchanged by the pipeline run (23 weeks, W1 2026-06-08 -> W23 2026-11-09, phases Base/Build/Peak/Taper/Race matching CLAUDE.md). No agent charter grants write scope covering data/plan.json; analyst and builder read it only. site/data/plan.json is an identical copy.

Grepped repo (working tree, excluding .git) for sk-, ghp_, Authorization: Bearer, api_key=, access_token, STRAVA_*TOKEN patterns: no hits. .gitignore excludes .env and *.local.json; .claude/settings.json contains only hook wiring; .claude/settings.local.json contains only permission entries. Strava access is via MCP tools, no credentials in repo.

Best-effort from file layout: development commits to date use conventional phase-boundary messages (phase-1 .. phase-4). The just-completed end-to-end W28 refresh output (raw re-fetch, summary regen, site/data copies, gate D, 05_REVIEWER.md) is coherent as a single pending changeset awaiting one conventional commit per CLAUDE.md 7; no evidence of split or non-conventional pipeline commits. Caveat: the commit itself happens after this review, so compliance is verifiable only up to intent.
